title: Oritech steel tools
description: Small addon for Oritech mod which adds a set of steel tools that can be crafted and recycled using Oritech materials and mechanisms
body: # Oritech Steel Tools A small toolset expansion for the **Oritech** ecosystem. This mod introduces a durable set of steel tools that sit between Iron and Diamond tiers, providing a meaningful progression path for industrial-minded players. This toolkit includes: * !["Steel sword"](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/terkonridge/oritech-steel-tools/refs/heads/1.21.1/common/src/main/resources/assets/oritech_steel_tools/textures/item/steel_sword.png) **Steel Sword** * !["Steel pickaxe"](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/terkonridge/oritech-steel-tools/refs/heads/1.21.1/common/src/main/resources/assets/oritech_steel_tools/textures/item/steel_pickaxe.png) **Steel Pickaxe** * !["Steel axe"](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/terkonridge/oritech-steel-tools/refs/heads/1.21.1/common/src/main/resources/assets/oritech_steel_tools/textures/item/steel_axe.png) **Steel Axe** * !["Steel shovel"](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/terkonridge/oritech-steel-tools/refs/heads/1.21.1/common/src/main/resources/assets/oritech_steel_tools/textures/item/steel_shovel.png) **Steel Shovel** * !["Steel hoe"](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/terkonridge/oritech-steel-tools/refs/heads/1.21.1/common/src/main/resources/assets/oritech_steel_tools/textures/item/steel_hoe.png) **Steel Hoe** ### Tool Statistics ||| | :--- | :--- | | Durability | **832** | | Mining Level | **Iron** | | Damage/Mining speed | Balanced between Iron and Diamond | --- ### Crafting & Processing If you have managed to produce **Silicon**, these tools offer a much easier alternative to Diamond gear during the early-to-mid stages of the game. **Crafting:** Crafting requires **Steel Ingots** and **Silicon** from the Oritech mod. | ![image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/terkonridge/oritech-steel-tools/refs/heads/1.21.1/manual/steel_axe_crafting.jpg) | ![image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/terkonridge/oritech-steel-tools/refs/heads/1.21.1/manual/steel_hoe_crafting.jpg) | ![image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/terkonridge/oritech-steel-tools/refs/heads/1.21.1/manual/steel_shovel_crafting.jpg) | |:--------------:|:--------------:|:--------------:| | ![image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/terkonridge/oritech-steel-tools/refs/heads/1.21.1/manual/steel_pickaxe_crafting.jpg) | ![image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/terkonridge/oritech-steel-tools/refs/heads/1.21.1/manual/steel_sword_crafting.jpg) | | **Pulverizer and Fragment forge processing:** You can recycle and process these tools using Oritech's mechanical systems just like other metal items. | ![image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/terkonridge/oritech-steel-tools/refs/heads/1.21.1/manual/steel_pickaxe_pulverizer.jpg) | ![image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/terkonridge/oritech-steel-tools/refs/heads/1.21.1/manual/steel_pickaxe_grinder.jpg) | |:--------------------:|:--------------------:| --- ### Installation 1. Make sure you have **Oritech** installed. 4. Works on both **Fabric** and **NeoForge**.
